description: This photograph depicts a reservoir nestled within a steep, rocky, mountainous landscape, identified as being in the Canary Islands, Spain. The water in the reservoir appears a pale greenish-yellow. A dam wall is visible in the background. A red dashed line delineates the current visible water level along the shore. According to the accompanying text, this image illustrates the "wrong interpretation" for the delimitation of water bodies, specifically in the context of using the maximum water level for mapping, implying that the depicted water level is not the maximum. Credit: M. Palacios.
